payload.prompt:
cinematic realistic scene of a lone woman standing in the center of a destroyed city street during a storm, rain falling steadily, dark clouds above, subtle lightning in the distance

she stands still facing forward, calm and powerful presence, no movement except wind and rain

camera slowly pushes in from wide shot to medium shot in a smooth continuous motion

environment slowly intensifies (wind, rain, distant lightning), but character remains perfectly still

at peak moment, a strong lightning flash lights the entire scene for a brief instant

immediately after the flash, scene subtly resets to the original wide shot composition (same position, same framing), creating a seamless loop effect

ultra realistic, cinematic lighting, high contrast, dramatic atmosphere, depth of field, film style, no fantasy effects, no sci-fi elements

payload.prompt:
same T-800 terminator endoskeleton, continuity from previous shot, damaged metallic chrome body with fire and smoke

robot movement strictly mechanical and non-human, rigid joints, segmented motion, visible step-by-step actuation, slight pauses between each movement, jerky and stuttering behavior, no fluid motion

servo motor behavior: head rotates in sharp increments, arms move with delayed response, legs locking and unlocking unnaturally

robot attempts one final step, leg partially fails, knee joint locks abruptly

sudden imbalance, torso tilts forward in a stiff unnatural way (no smooth falling), body collapses in heavy, rigid segments

impact on ground feels heavy and metallic, limbs hit ground in sequence (not fluid), sparks on contact

red eyes flicker erratically, then dim in steps (not instant), final flicker then complete shutdown

body remains motionless, slight twitch of a finger then fully still, smoke rising, small flames continuing

camera slowly pulls back and slightly lowers, framing full body on the ground, cinematic low angle, dramatic lighting, ash and embers in air

ultra realistic, high detail, volumetric lighting, no human behavior, fully robotic face, consistent character

payload.prompt:
same T-800 terminator endoskeleton, continuity from previous shot, full metallic chrome skeleton

robot walking forward with stiff, unnatural robotic movement, slight jerks and mechanical glitches in joints, head movement delayed and precise, no smooth human motion

body heavily damaged, exposed internal parts sparking, small flames burning on shoulder and chest, dark smoke rising from its body, glowing red eyes flickering

environment filled with smoke and embers, post-apocalyptic battlefield, dim cinematic lighting

robot begins to slow down, steps becoming unstable, movements stuttering, one arm partially failing

camera slowly pulling back while slightly lowering angle, maintaining full body in frame, subtle shake for impact

terminator stops, stands still for a moment, sparks intensify, eyes flicker rapidly, then shut off completely

robot powers down and freezes in place, slight forward tilt, smoke and fire still active around the body

ultra realistic, cinematic, volumetric lighting, high detail, consistent design, no human skin

realistic T-800 terminator endoskeleton rising from ground, metallic chrome skeleton covered in dust and debris, glowing red eyes activating

camera continues falling back to keep full body centered in frame, low angle cinematic shot, dramatic lighting, post-apocalyptic war environment, smoke and particles in air

ultra realistic, high detail, cinematic, volumetric lighting, depth of field, consistent character design, no human skin, fully robotic face
